content:
Use EXACTLY ONE of the following Semiotic Doctrines. Ignore all others.

Semiotic Doctrines (activate only the number I specify):
1. Saussurean Dyad (arbitrary sign, pure difference, no positive terms, langue as negative system)
2. Peircean Unlimited Semiosis (triadic sign, infinite interpretants, no final meaning, only habits)
3. Derridean Différance (trace, deferral, sous rature, no origin, writing before speech)
4. Barthesian Myth (second-order signification, bourgeois naturalization, denotation devoured by connotation)
5. Lacanian Symbolic (the big Other, barred subject, lack inscribed in the signifier chain)
6. Baudrillardian Simulacra (four stages, hyperreality, death of the real by its perfect sign)
7. Greimasian Semiotic Square (binary oppositions exploded into contradiction and neutralization)
8. Eco Model Reader (open work, encyclopedic competence, aberrant decoding as creativity)
9. Lotman Semiosphere (boundary translation, explosion vs implosion, autocommunication)
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 12 (chunk 12/18)
